// Generated by Dokter Website const DB_NAME = "Database Rumah Aroma"; const SESSION_EXPIRY_SEC = 28800; // Sesi aktif 8 Jam const MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS = 5; const LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS = 10000; // Timeout lock spreadsheet 10 detik const PUBLIC_STORE_TOKEN = "PUBLIC_STORE_TOKEN_SECURE_2026"; const TELEGRAM_TOKEN = "8585644069:AAGb36ajHKyPxt7JeH1x5ckTZBcGB3vZGtk"; const TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID = "-1002736637608"; function doGet(e) { return HtmlService.createTemplateFromFile('Index') .evaluate() .setTitle('Rumah Aroma Indonesia - Premium Custom Perfume') .addMetaTag('viewport', 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1') .setXFrameOptionsMode(HtmlService.XFrameOptionsMode.ALLOWALL); } function setupDatabase() { const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const sheets = { "Aroma": ["AromaID", "NamaAroma", "BrandReferensi", "KategoriAroma", "Deskripsi", "HargaDasar", "Status"], "Konsentrasi": ["KonsentrasiID", "NamaKonsentrasi", "Persentase", "FaktorHarga", "Ketahanan"], "Volume": ["VolumeID", "NamaVolume", "Kategori", "HargaDasar"], "Botol": ["BotolID", "NamaBotol", "VolumeID", "BiayaTambahan", "Gambar", "Status"], "KuisPertanyaan": ["PertanyaanID", "Pertanyaan", "Urutan"], "KuisJawaban": ["JawabanID", "PertanyaanID", "Jawaban", "AromaID"], "Pelanggan": ["PelangganID", "Nama", "WhatsApp", "Alamat", "TanggalDaftar"], "Pesanan": ["OrderID", "TanggalOrder", "PelangganID", "AromaID", "KonsentrasiID", "VolumeID", "BotolID", "HargaProduk", "MetodePembayaran", "StatusPesanan", "TotalBayar"], "Pembayaran": ["PembayaranID", "OrderID", "MetodePembayaran", "Nominal", "StatusPembayaran", "TanggalBayar"], "Users": ["Username", "PasswordHash", "Fullname", "Role"], "AuditLog": ["Timestamp", "Username", "Action", "Detail"] }; for (let sheetName in sheets) { let sheet = ss.getSheetByName(sheetName); if (!sheet) { sheet = ss.insertSheet(sheetName); sheet.appendRow(sheets[sheetName]); } } const userSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Users"); if (userSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { userSheet.appendRow(["admin", hashPassword("Admin@2026"), "Super Admin", "Admin"]); } populateDefaultMasters(ss); return { success: true, message: "Database siap digunakan!" }; } function populateDefaultMasters(ss) { const aromaSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Aroma"); if (aromaSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { aromaSheet.appendRow(["ARM-001", "Baccarat Rouge 540", "MFK", "Sweet", "Aroma mewah elegan dengan sentuhan saffron hangat.", 50000, "Aktif"]); aromaSheet.appendRow(["ARM-002", "Aventus", "Creed", "Fresh", "Maskulin, segar, dan berwibawa didominasi kesegaran nanas.", 60000, "Aktif"]); aromaSheet.appendRow(["ARM-003", "Black Opium", "YSL", "Sweet", "Manis dan adiktif perpaduan kopi hangat dan vanilla.", 45000, "Aktif"]); aromaSheet.appendRow(["ARM-004", "Sauvage", "Dior", "Fresh", "Segar dan spicy mewah, cocok untuk aktivitas kasual.", 55000, "Aktif"]); aromaSheet.appendRow(["ARM-005", "English Pear & Freesia", "Jo Malone", "Floral", "Ringan, segar, floral romantis dan elegan.", 40000, "Aktif"]); } const konsentrasiSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Konsentrasi"); if (konsentrasiSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { konsentrasiSheet.appendRow(["KON-001", "Eau de Toilette (EDT)", 10, 1.0, "4-6 Jam"]); konsentrasiSheet.appendRow(["KON-002", "Eau de Parfum (EDP)", 20, 1.5, "8-12 Jam"]); konsentrasiSheet.appendRow(["KON-003", "Extrait de Parfum", 35, 2.2, "12-24 Jam"]); } const volumeSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Volume"); if (volumeSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { volumeSheet.appendRow(["VOL-001", "10ml", "Discovery", 20000]); volumeSheet.appendRow(["VOL-002", "30ml", "Beginner", 50000]); volumeSheet.appendRow(["VOL-003", "50ml", "Expert", 80000]); } const botolSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Botol"); if (botolSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { botolSheet.appendRow(["BTL-001", "Kaca Bening Roll-on", "VOL-001", 0, "", "Aktif"]); botolSheet.appendRow(["BTL-002", "Travel Size Spray", "VOL-001", 3000, "", "Aktif"]); botolSheet.appendRow(["BTL-003", "Kaca Spray Standard", "VOL-002", 5000, "", "Aktif"]); botolSheet.appendRow(["BTL-004", "Matte Black Premium", "VOL-003", 15000, "", "Aktif"]); botolSheet.appendRow(["BTL-005", "Crystal Clear Premium", "VOL-003", 12000, "", "Aktif"]); } const qSheet = ss.getSheetByName("KuisPertanyaan"); if (qSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { qSheet.appendRow(["Q-001", "Bagaimana Anda ingin dideskripsikan oleh orang di sekitar Anda?", 1]); qSheet.appendRow(["Q-002", "Aktivitas utama saat menggunakan parfum ini?", 2]); qSheet.appendRow(["Q-003", "Vibe aroma alam mana yang paling Anda sukai?", 3]); } const aSheet = ss.getSheetByName("KuisJawaban"); if (aSheet.getLastRow() === 1) { aSheet.appendRow(["A-001", "Q-001", "Manis, hangat, & memikat", "ARM-001"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-002", "Q-001", "Segar, energik, & berwibawa", "ARM-002"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-003", "Q-001", "Lembut, romantis, & anggun", "ARM-005"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-004", "Q-002", "Acara formal / Pertemuan penting malam hari", "ARM-003"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-005", "Q-002", "Kasual, olahraga / Aktivitas harian luar ruangan", "ARM-004"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-006", "Q-003", "Kopi hangat & toko kue vanili", "ARM-003"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-007", "Q-003", "Kebun buah tropis yang segar setelah hujan", "ARM-002"]); aSheet.appendRow(["A-008", "Q-003", "Taman mawar dan freesia mekar di pagi hari", "ARM-005"]); } } function hashPassword(password) { const digest = Utilities.computeDigest(Utilities.DigestAlgorithm.SHA_256, password, Utilities.Charset.UTF_8); let hexString = ''; for (let i = 0; i < digest.length; i++) { let byteVal = digest[i]; if (byteVal < 0) byteVal += 256; let byteString = byteVal.toString(16); if (byteString.length == 1) byteString = '0' + byteString; hexString += byteString; } return hexString; } function loginUser(username, password) { const cleanUsername = sanitizeInput(username, 50); if (checkLoginRateLimit(cleanUsername)) { return { success: false, message: "Terlalu banyak percobaan gagal. Akun dikunci sementara 15 menit." }; } const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const sheet = ss.getSheetByName("Users"); const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues(); const passHash = hashPassword(password); for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) { if (data[i][0] === cleanUsername && data[i][1] === passHash) { clearLoginFailures(cleanUsername); const token = generateSessionToken(cleanUsername); logAction(cleanUsername, "LOGIN", "Berhasil login ke Dashboard Admin"); return { success: true, user: { username: data[i][0], fullname: data[i][2], role: data[i][3] }, token: token }; } } recordLoginFailure(cleanUsername); return { success: false, message: "Username atau password salah." }; } function generateSessionToken(username) { const token = Utilities.getUuid(); const cache = CacheService.getScriptCache(); cache.put(token, username, SESSION_EXPIRY_SEC); return token; } function validateSession(token) { if (token === PUBLIC_STORE_TOKEN) { return { valid: true, username: "public_customer", role: "Public" }; } if (!token) return { valid: false, message: "Sesi tidak valid / Token kosong" }; const cache = CacheService.getScriptCache(); const username = cache.get(token); if (!username) return { valid: false, message: "Sesi kedaluwarsa. Silakan login ulang." }; cache.put(token, username, SESSION_EXPIRY_SEC); return { valid: true, username: username }; } function destroySession(token) { const cache = CacheService.getScriptCache(); cache.remove(token); return { success: true }; } function checkLoginRateLimit(username) { const cache = CacheService.getScriptCache(); const key = "lock_" + username; return cache.get(key) !== null; } function recordLoginFailure(username) { const cache = CacheService.getScriptCache(); const keyCounter = "fail_cnt_" + username; let currentCount = parseInt(cache.get(keyCounter) || "0") + 1; cache.put(keyCounter, currentCount.toString(), 900); if (currentCount >= MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS) { const keyLock = "lock_" + username; cache.put(keyLock, "locked", 900); cache.remove(keyCounter); } } function clearLoginFailures(username) { const cache = CacheService.getScriptCache(); cache.remove("fail_cnt_" + username); cache.remove("lock_" + username); } function logAction(username, action, detail) { try { const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const sheet = ss.getSheetByName("AuditLog"); sheet.appendRow([new Date(), username, action, detail]); } catch (e) { Logger.log("Gagal menulis audit log: " + e.toString()); } } function getPublicData(token) { const session = validateSession(token); if (!session.valid) return { success: false, message: session.message }; const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const aromaData = ss.getSheetByName("Aroma").getDataRange().getValues(); const aroma = aromaData.slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], nama: r[1], brand: r[2], kategori: r[3], deskripsi: r[4], hargaDasar: Number(r[5]), status: r[6] })); const konsenData = ss.getSheetByName("Konsentrasi").getDataRange().getValues(); const konsentrasi = konsenData.slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], nama: r[1], persentase: Number(r[2]), faktorHarga: Number(r[3]), ketahanan: r[4] })); const volData = ss.getSheetByName("Volume").getDataRange().getValues(); const volume = volData.slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], nama: r[1], kategori: r[2], hargaDasar: Number(r[3]) })); const botolData = ss.getSheetByName("Botol").getDataRange().getValues(); const botol = botolData.slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], nama: r[1], volId: r[2], biayaTambahan: Number(r[3]), gambar: r[4], status: r[5] })); const kuisQ = ss.getSheetByName("KuisPertanyaan").getDataRange().getValues(); const kuisPertanyaan = kuisQ.slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], teks: r[1], urutan: Number(r[2]) })).sort((a,b) => a.urutan - b.urutan); const kuisA = ss.getSheetByName("KuisJawaban").getDataRange().getValues(); const kuisJawaban = kuisA.slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], qId: r[1], teks: r[2], aromaId: r[3] })); return { success: true, data: { aroma, konsentrasi, volume, botol, kuisPertanyaan, kuisJawaban } }; } function createOrder(token, orderPayload) { const session = validateSession(token); if (!session.valid) return { success: false, message: session.message }; const lock = LockService.getScriptLock(); try { if (!lock.tryLock(LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS)) { return { success: false, message: "Sistem sedang sibuk. Silakan coba kembali." }; } const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const custSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Pelanggan"); const orderSheet = ss.getSheetByName("Pesanan"); const paySheet = ss.getSheetByName("Pembayaran"); const cleanWA = sanitizeInput(orderPayload.customer.wa, 20); const cleanName = sanitizeInput(orderPayload.customer.nama, 100); const cleanAddr = sanitizeInput(orderPayload.customer.alamat, 500); const custData = custSheet.getDataRange().getValues(); let custId = ""; for (let i = 1; i < custData.length; i++) { if (custData[i][2] === cleanWA) { custId = custData[i][0]; break; } } if (!custId) { custId = "CUST-" + Utilities.getUuid().slice(0, 8).toUpperCase(); custSheet.appendRow([custId, cleanName, cleanWA, cleanAddr, new Date()]); } const dateStr = Utilities.formatDate(new Date(), "GMT+7", "yyyyMMdd"); const randCode = Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000); const orderId = "ORDER-" + dateStr + "-" + randCode; const hargaSatuan = (orderPayload.aroma.hargaDasar + orderPayload.volume.hargaDasar) * orderPayload.konsentrasi.faktorHarga + orderPayload.botol.biayaTambahan; const totalHarga = hargaSatuan * (orderPayload.quantity || 1); orderSheet.appendRow([ orderId, new Date(), custId, orderPayload.aroma.id, orderPayload.konsentrasi.id, orderPayload.volume.id, orderPayload.botol.id, hargaSatuan, orderPayload.payment, "Menunggu Pembayaran", totalHarga ]); const payId = "PAY-" + Utilities.getUuid().slice(0, 8).toUpperCase(); paySheet.appendRow([ payId, orderId, orderPayload.payment, totalHarga, "Pending", "" ]); sendTelegramNotification(orderId, orderPayload, cleanName, cleanWA, cleanAddr, totalHarga); return { success: true, orderId: orderId }; } catch (err) { return { success: false, message: "Kesalahan server: " + err.toString() }; } finally { lock.releaseLock(); } } function sendTelegramNotification(orderId, orderPayload, custName, custWA, custAddr, totalHarga) { const url = "https://api.telegram.org/bot" + TELEGRAM_TOKEN + "/sendMessage"; let message = "⚜️ LAPORAN PESANAN MASUK - RUMAH AROMA ⚜️\n"; message += "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"; message += "ID Pesanan : " + orderId + "\n"; message += "Waktu : " + safeDateFormat(new Date()) + " WIB\n\n"; message += "👤 DATA PELANGGAN :\n"; message += "• Nama : " + custName + "\n"; message += "• WhatsApp : " + custWA + "\n"; message += "• Alamat : " + custAddr + "\n\n"; message += "🧪 DETAIL PARFUM KUSTOM :\n"; message += "• Aroma : " + orderPayload.aroma.nama + " (Ref: " + orderPayload.aroma.brand + ")\n"; message += "• Konsentrasi : " + orderPayload.konsentrasi.nama + "\n"; message += "• Volume : " + orderPayload.volume.nama + "\n"; message += "• Desain Botol : " + orderPayload.botol.nama + "\n"; message += "• Jumlah Pesanan : " + orderPayload.quantity + " Botol\n\n"; message += "💳 INFORMASI PEMBAYARAN :\n"; message += "• Metode : " + orderPayload.payment + "\n"; message += "• Total Bayar : Rp " + Number(totalHarga).toLocaleString('id-ID') + "\n"; message += "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n"; message += "Mohon periksa mutasi bank / QRIS Anda untuk validasi."; const options = { "method": "post", "contentType": "application/json", "payload": JSON.stringify({ "chat_id": TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, "text": message, "parse_mode": "HTML" }), "muteHttpExceptions": true }; try { UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options); } catch (e) { Logger.log("Gagal mengirim Telegram: " + e.toString()); } } function getAdminDashboard(token) { const session = validateSession(token); if (!session.valid) return { success: false, message: session.message, sessionExpired: true }; const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const orderData = ss.getSheetByName("Pesanan").getDataRange().getValues().slice(1); const aromaCount = ss.getSheetByName("Aroma").getLastRow() - 1; const custCount = ss.getSheetByName("Pelanggan").getLastRow() - 1; let omset = 0; orderData.forEach(r => { if (["Diproses", "Dikirim", "Selesai"].indexOf(r[9]) > -1) { omset += Number(r[10] || 0); } }); const parsedOrders = orderData.map(r => ({ orderId: r[0], tanggal: safeDateFormat(r[1]), pelangganNama: getCustomerName(ss, r[2]), aromaNama: getAromaName(ss, r[3]), totalBayar: Number(r[10]), status: r[9] })).reverse(); return { success: true, data: { pesanan: parsedOrders, totalAroma: aromaCount, totalPelanggan: custCount, totalOmset: omset } }; } function getAromaList(token) { const session = validateSession(token); if (!session.valid) return { success: false, message: session.message, sessionExpired: true }; const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const list = ss.getSheetByName("Aroma").getDataRange().getValues().slice(1).map(r => ({ id: r[0], nama: r[1], brand: r[2], kategori: r[3], deskripsi: r[4], hargaDasar: Number(r[5]), status: r[6] })); return { success: true, data: list }; } function saveAromaData(token, payload) { const session = validateSession(token); if (!session.valid) return { success: false, message: session.message, sessionExpired: true }; const lock = LockService.getScriptLock(); try { if (!lock.tryLock(LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS)) return { success: false, message: "Database dikunci oleh proses lain." }; const ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); const sheet = ss.getSheetByName("Aroma"); const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues(); let rowIdx = -1; const cleanNama = sanitizeInput(payload.nama, 100); const cleanBrand = sanitizeInput(payload.brand, 100); const cleanDesc = sanitizeInput(payload.deskripsi, 500); if (payload.id) { for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) { if (data[i][0] === payload.id) { rowIdx = i + 1; break; } } } if (rowIdx > -1) { sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 2, 1, 6).setValues([[ cleanNama, cleanBrand, payload.kategori, cleanDesc, payload.hargaDasar, payload.status ]]); logAction(session.username, "UPDATE_AROMA", "Mengubah aroma " + payload.id); } else { const newId = "ARM-" + Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 9000); sheet.appendRow([ newId, cleanNama, cleanBrand, payload.kategori, cleanDesc, payload.hargaDasar, payload.status ]); logAction(session.username, "CREATE_AROMA", "Membuat master aroma baru " + newId); } return { success: true }; } catch(e) { return { success: false, message: e.toString() }; } finally { lock.releaseLock(); } } function getCustomerName(ss, custId) { const data = ss.getSheetByName("Pelanggan").getDataRange().getValues(); for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) { if (data[i][0] === custId) return data[i][1]; } return "Pelanggan Umum"; } function getAromaName(ss, aromaId) { const data = ss.getSheetByName("Aroma").getDataRange().getValues(); for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) { if (data[i][0] === aromaId) return data[i][1]; } return "-"; } function sanitizeInput(val, maxLength) { if (!val) return ""; let clean = String(val).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); if (clean.length > maxLength) { clean = clean.slice(0, maxLength); } return clean; } function safeDateFormat(val) { if (!val) return "-"; if (val instanceof Date) { return Utilities.formatDate(val, "GMT+7", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm"); } return String(val); }
